name: Blink Dagger
description_raw:
Active: Blink

Teleport to a target point up to %blink_range% units away.

Blink Dagger cannot be used for %blink_damage_cooldown% seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: The fabled dagger used by the fastest assassin ever to walk the lands.

name: Overwhelming Blink
description_raw:
Active: Overwhelming Blink

Teleport to a target point up to %blink_range% units away.

After teleportation, all enemies in a %radius% AoE take damage equal to %damage_base% + %damage_pct_instant%%% of your strength and an additional %damage_pct_over_time%%% over time, and have %movement_slow%%% movement speed slow and %attack_slow% attack speed slow for %duration% seconds.

Overwhelming Blink cannot be used for %blink_damage_cooldown% seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: A horrifying dagger forged in the chaos maw and nigh untouchable by mortal hands.

name: Swift Blink
description_raw:
Active: Swift Blink

Teleport to a target point up to %blink_range% units away.

After teleportation, you gain %bonus_movement%%% phased movement speed and +%bonus_agi_active% Agility for %duration% seconds.

Swift Blink cannot be used for %blink_damage_cooldown% seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: A cunning blade able to anticipate and enable its bearer's movements.

name: Arcane Blink
description_raw:
Active: Arcane Blink

Teleport to a target point up to %blink_range% units away.

After teleportation, you restore %heal_amount% health and %mana_amount% mana.

Arcane Blink cannot be used for %blink_damage_cooldown% seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: A revitalizing tool to help bear the weight of arcane expenditure.

name: Blades of Attack
lore: The damage of these small, concealable blades should not be underestimated.

name: Broadsword
lore: The classic weapon of choice for knights, this blade is sturdy and reliable for slaying enemies.

name: Chainmail
lore: A medium weave of metal chains.

name: Claymore
lore: A sword that can cut through armor, it's a commonly chosen first weapon for budding swordsmen.

name: Helm of Iron Will
lore: The helmet of a legendary warrior who fell in battle.

name: Javelin
description_raw:
Passive: Pierce

Grants each attack a %bonus_chance%%% chance to pierce through evasion and deal %bonus_chance_damage% bonus magical damage.
lore: A rather typical spear that can sometimes pierce through an enemy's armor when used to attack.

name: Mithril Hammer
lore: A hammer forged of pure mithril.

name: Platemail
lore: Thick metal plates that protect the entire upper body. Avoid dropping on feet.

name: Quarterstaff
lore: A basic staff that allows you to strike quickly.

name: Quelling Blade
description_raw:
Active: Chop Tree

Destroy a target tree. \n\n

Passive: Quell

Increases attack damage against non-hero units by %damage_bonus% for melee heroes, and %damage_bonus_ranged% for ranged.
lore: The axe of a fallen gnome, it allows you to effectively maneuver the forest.

name: Faerie Fire
description_raw:
Use: Imbue

Instantly restores %hp_restore% health.
lore: The ethereal flames from the ever-burning ruins of Kindertree ignite across realities.

name: Infused Raindrops
description_raw:
Passive: Magical Damage Block

Consumes a charge to block %magic_damage_block% magic damage from damage instances over %min_damage% damage.

Comes with %initial_charges% charges. When the charges are gone, the item disappears.
lore: Elemental protection from magical assaults.

name: Wind Lace
description_raw: Bonuses from multiple Wind Laces do not stack.
lore: Hasten to battle on wind-touched heels.

name: Ring of Protection
lore: A glimmering ring that defends its bearer.

name: Stout Shield
description_raw:
Passive: Damage Block

Grants a %block_chance%%% chance to block %damage_block_melee% damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and %damage_block_ranged% damage on ranged.
lore: One man's wine barrel bottom is another man's shield.

name: Moon Shard
description_raw:
Use: Consume

Consume the Moon Shard to permanently gain %consumed_bonus% attack speed and %consumed_bonus_night_vision% bonus night vision. Max 1 use.\n\n

Passive: Shade Sight

Grants bonus night vision.
lore: Said to be a tear from the lunar goddess Selemene.

name: Gauntlets of Strength
lore: Studded leather gloves that add brute strength.

name: Slippers of Agility
lore: Light boots made from spider skin that tingles your senses.

name: Mantle of Intelligence
lore: A beautiful sapphire mantle worn by generations of queens.

name: Iron Branch
description_raw:
Use: Plant Tree

Targets the ground to plant a happy little tree that lasts for %tree_duration% seconds.
lore: A seemingly ordinary branch, its ironlike qualities are bestowed upon the bearer.

name: Belt of Strength
lore: A valued accessory for improving vitality.

name: Band of Elvenskin
lore: A tensile fabric often used for its light weight and ease of movement.

name: Robe of the Magi
lore: This robe corrupts the soul of the user, but provides wisdom in return.

name: Circlet
lore: An elegant circlet designed for human princesses.

name: Crown
lore: A stately crown created to ensure a well-meaning but ungifted heir could fend off usurpers and govern with a strong hand.

name: Diadem
lore: A crown that can never be removed.

name: Ogre Axe
lore: You grow stronger just by holding it.

name: Blade of Alacrity
lore: A long blade imbued with time magic.

name: Staff of Wizardry
lore: A staff of magical powers passed down from the eldest mages.

name: Ultimate Orb
lore: A mystical orb containing the essence of life.

name: Gloves of Haste
lore: A pair of magical gloves that seems to render weapons weightless.

name: Blitz Knuckles
lore: An underground arcanist's update of a back-alley classic.

name: Morbid Mask
description_raw:
Passive: Lifesteal

Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.
lore: A mask that drains the energy of those caught in its gaze.

name: Voodoo Mask
description_raw:
Passive: Spell Lifesteal

Heals the wearer for a percentage of spell damage dealt to enemies.
lore: A mask tuned to sip the arcane bindings that pass between caster and foe.

name: Ring of Regen
lore: This ring is considered a good luck charm among the Gnomes.

name: Sage's Mask
lore: A mask commonly used by mages and warlocks for various rituals.

name: Boots of Speed
description_raw: Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Fleet footwear, increasing movement.

name: Gem of True Sight
description_raw:
Active: Reveal

Gives True Sight over a %active_radius% radius revealing wards and units even in Fog of War.

Passive: True Sight

Grants the ability to see invisible units and wards to any allied vision within %radius% range of its carrier.

Passive: Everlasting

Dropped on death, and cannot be destroyed.
lore:
Not one thrall creature of the depths,
Nor spirit bound in drowning's keep,
Nor Maelrawn the Tentacular,
Shall rest till seas, gem comes to sleep.

name: Cloak
lore: A cloak made of a magical material that works to dispel any magic cast on it.

name: Talisman of Evasion
lore: A necklace that allows you to anticipate enemy attacks.

name: Cheese
description_raw:
Use: Fondue

Instantly restores %health_restore% health and %mana_restore% mana.
lore: Made from the milk of a long lost Furbolg vendor, it restores the vitality of those who taste it.

name: Magic Stick
description_raw:
Active: Energy Charge

Instantly restores %restore_per_charge% health and mana per charge stored.

Max %max_charges% charges. Gains a charge whenever a visible enemy within %charge_radius% range uses an ability.
lore: A simple wand used to channel magic energies, it is favored by apprentice wizards and great warlocks alike.

name: Magic Wand
description_raw:
Active: Energy Charge

Instantly restores %restore_per_charge% health and mana per charge stored.

Max %max_charges% charges. Gains a charge whenever a visible enemy within %charge_radius% range uses an ability.
lore: A simple wand used to channel magic energies, it is favored by apprentice wizards and great warlocks alike.

name: Ghost Scepter
description_raw:
Active: Ghost Form

You enter ghost form for %duration% seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but are unable to attack and %extra_spell_damage_percent%%% more vulnerable to magic damage.
lore: Imbues the wielder with a ghostly presence, allowing them to evade physical damage.

name: Clarity
description_raw:
Use: Replenish

Grants %mana_regen% mana regeneration to the target for %buff_duration% seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.
lore: Clear water that enhances the ability to meditate.

name: Enchanted Mango
description_raw:
Use: Eat Mango

Instantly restores %replenish_amount% mana.
lore: The bittersweet flavors of Jidi Isle are irresistible to amphibians.

name: Healing Lotus
description_raw:
Use: Eat Lotus

Instantly restores %replenish_amount% health and mana.

name: Great Healing Lotus
description_raw:
Use: Eat Lotus

Instantly restores %replenish_amount% health and mana.

name: Greater Healing Lotus
description_raw:
Use: Eat Lotus

Instantly restores %replenish_amount% health and mana.

name: Blood Grenade
description_raw:
Use: Throw Grenade

Throw a grenade at the target area. Enemies in the area will take %impact_damage% damage on impact, and be slowed by %movespeed_slow%%% and take %damage_over_time% damage every %tick_rate%s for %debuff_duration% seconds. Radius %radius%.
lore: Both the hunter and the hunted must pay the blood price.

name: Block of Cheese
description_raw:
Use: Scrumptious

Try me!
lore: First there was the Belt of Strength. Then there were the Boots of Travel. Now, at long last, the Block of Cheese.

name: Healing Salve
description_raw:
Use: Salve

Grants %health_regen% health regeneration to the target for %buff_duration% seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Heals for half the amount per second when cast on an ally.
lore: A magical salve that can quickly mend even the deepest of wounds.

name: Dust of Appearance
description_raw:
Use: Reveal

For %duration% seconds, creates an area that reveals and slows invisible heroes by %movespeed%%% in a %radius% radius where the caster was standing. Invisible units revealed by dust take %damage% damage.

The debuff effect on enemies lingers for %linger_duration%s after leaving the area of effect.
lore: One may hide visage, but never volume.

name: Bottle
description_raw:
Active: Regenerate

Consumes a charge to restore %health_restore% health and %mana_restore% mana over %restore_time% seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

The Bottle automatically refills at the fountain.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.\n\n

Passive: Store Rune

Runes can be stored in the Bottle for later use by right-clicking them. Unused runes will automatically activate after 90 seconds.

Using a stored rune fully refills the Bottle.
lore: An old bottle that survived the ages, the contents placed inside become enchanted.

name: Observer Ward
description_raw:
Use: Plant

Plants an Observer Ward, an invisible watcher that gives ground vision in a %vision_range_tooltip% radius to your team. Lasts %duration_minutes_tooltip% minutes.

Hold Control to give one Observer Ward to an allied hero.
lore: A form of half-sentient plant, often cultivated by apprentice wizards.

name: Sentry Ward
description_raw:
Use: Plant

Plants a Sentry Ward, an invisible watcher that grants True Sight, the ability to see invisible enemy units and wards, to any existing allied vision within a %true_sight_range% radius.
Lasts %duration_minutes_tooltip% minutes.

Does not grant ground vision.
Hold Control to give one Sentry Ward to an allied hero.
lore: A form of plant originally grown in the garden of a fearful king.

name: Observer and Sentry Wards
description_raw:
Use: Plant

Plant the currently active ward. Double-Click to switch the currently active ward.
lore: Advancements in stacking efficiency have made wards easier to carry than ever.

name: Tango
description_raw:
Use: Devour

Consumes a target tree to gain %health_regen% health regeneration for %buff_duration% seconds. Consuming an Ironwood Tree doubles the heal duration.

Comes with %tooltip_charges% charges. Can be used on an allied hero to give them one Tango.

Tree Range: %abilitycastrange%
lore: Forage to survive on the battlefield.

name: Tango (Shared)
description_raw:
Use: Devour

Consumes a target tree to gain %health_regen% health regeneration for %buff_duration% seconds. Consuming an Ironwood Tree doubles the heal duration.

Tree Range: %abilitycastrange%
lore: Om nom nom.

name: Town Portal Scroll
description_raw:
Use: Teleport

After channeling for %tooltip_channel_time% seconds, teleports you to a target friendly building.

Double-click to teleport to your team's base fountain.
lore: What a hero truly needs.

name: Boots of Travel
description_raw:
Upgrade: Town Portal Scroll

Upgrades your Town Portal Scroll, allowing it to target units, reduces cooldown and does not consume a charge on usage. \nMovement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Winged boots that grant omnipresence.

name: Boots of Travel 2
description_raw:
Upgrade: Town Portal Scroll

Upgrades your Town Portal Scroll, allowing it to target units and heroes, reduces cooldown, channel time and does not consume a charge on usage. \nMovement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Winged boots that grant omnipresence.

name: Phase Boots
description_raw:
Active: Phase

Gives %phase_movement_speed%%% increased movement speed on melee heroes, and %phase_movement_speed_range%%% on ranged heroes, and lets you move through units and turn more quickly for %phase_duration% seconds.\nMovement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Boots that allow the wearer to travel between the ether.

name: Demon Edge
lore: One of the oldest weapons forged by the Demon-Smith Abzidian, it killed its maker when he tested its edge.

name: Eaglesong
lore: Capturing the majestic call of an eagle, this mystical horn brings limitless dexterity to those who hear it.

name: Reaver
lore: A massive axe capable of tearing whole mountains down.

name: Sacred Relic
lore: An ancient weapon that often turns the tides of war.

name: Hyperstone
lore: A mystical, carved stone that boosts the fervor of the holder.

name: Ring of Health
lore: A shiny ring found beneath a fat halfling's corpse.

name: Ring of Tarrasque
lore: An ageless ring forged with an otherwise simple blood magic amplified by the presumed source of its key component.

name: Void Stone
lore: Jewelry that was once used to channel nether realm magic, this ring pulses with energy.

name: Tiara of Selemene
lore: A symbol of favor bestowed upon the high priestess of Selemene.

name: Mystic Staff
lore: Enigmatic staff made of only the most expensive crystals.

name: Energy Booster
lore: This lapis gemstone is commonly added to the collection of wizards seeking to improve their presence in combat.

name: Point Booster
lore: A perfectly formed amethyst that nourishes body and mind when held.

name: Vitality Booster
lore: A ruby gemstone that has been passed down through generations of warrior kin.

name: Fluffy Hat
lore: Fine and functional foppery for the fashion-forward fighter.

name: Power Treads
description_raw:
Active: Switch Attribute

Switches between +%bonus_stat% Strength, +%bonus_stat% Agility, or +%bonus_stat% Intelligence.\nMovement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: A pair of tough-skinned boots that change to meet the demands of the wearer.

name: Phylactery
description_raw:
Passive: Empower Spell

The next Unit Target spell you cast on an enemy deals a separate %bonus_spell_damage% bonus damage to the target and slows them by %slow%%% for %slow_duration%s.
lore: An amulet overflowing with powerful magics.

name: Khanda
description_raw:
Passive: Empower Spell

The next Unit Target spell you cast on an enemy deals a separate %bonus_spell_damage% additional damage, disables their passives, and slows their movement speed by %slow%%% for %slow_duration%s.
lore: A blade sharp enough to slice through magic itself.

name: Hand of Midas
description_raw:
Active: Transmute

Kills a non-hero target for %bonus_gold% gold. Killing a neutral creep additionally grants a madstone bundle.

Cannot be used on Ancient creeps.
lore: Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.

name: Oblivion Staff
lore: Deceptively hidden as an ordinary staff, it is actually very powerful, much like the Eldritch who originally possessed it.

name: Witch Blade
description_raw:
Passive: Witch Blade

Causes your next attack to apply a poison for %slow_duration% seconds, slowing by %slow%%% and dealing %int_damage_multiplier%x your intelligence as damage every second. This attack has True Strike.
lore: A spiteful blade inadvertently possessed by the soul of its incautious creator.

name: Perseverance
lore: A gem that grants heart to the bearer.

name: Cornucopia
lore: A source of spiritual and physical nourishment.

description_raw:
Passive: Damage Block

Gives a 100% chance to block %damage_block_melee% damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and %damage_block_ranged% damage on ranged.

Has a %block_chance%%% chance to block damage from creeps.
lore: A busted old shield that seems to block more than it should.

name: Bracer
lore: The bracer is a common choice to toughen up defenses and increase longevity.

name: Wraith Band
lore: A circlet with faint whispers echoing about it.

name: Null Talisman
lore: A small gemstone attached to several chains.

name: Mekansm
description_raw:
Active: Restore

Restores %heal_amount% health to allied units in a %heal_radius% radius.\n\n

Passive: Mekansm Aura

Grants %aura_health_regen% health regeneration to allied units in a %aura_radius% radius.
lore: A glowing jewel formed out of assorted parts that somehow fit together perfectly.

name: Vladmir's Offering
description_raw:
Passive: Vladmir's Aura

Grants %lifesteal_aura%%% lifesteal, %damage_aura%%% bonus damage, %mana_regen_aura% mana regeneration, and %armor_aura% armor to nearby allies.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: An eerie mask that is haunted with the malice of a fallen vampire.

name: Buckler
description_raw:
Passive: Buckler Aura

Grants %bonus_aoe_armor% armor to allied player units.

Radius: %bonus_aoe_radius%
lore: A powerful shield that imbues the bearer with the strength of heroes past, it is capable of protecting entire armies in battle.

name: Ring of Basilius
description_raw:
Passive: Basilius Aura

Grants %aura_mana_regen% mana regeneration to allies.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: Ring given as a reward to the greatest mages.

name: Holy Locket
description_raw:
Active: Energy Charge

Target an allied unit to increase their incoming Heal Amplification by %incoming_heal_increase_active%%% for %active_buff_duration%s and instantly restore %health_restore_per_charge% health and %mana_restore_per_charge% mana per charge stored.

Automatically gains a charge every %AbilityChargeRestoreTime% seconds and whenever a visible enemy within %charge_radius% range uses an ability.\n\n

Passive: Holy Blessing

Amplifies heals you provide by %heal_increase_passive%%%.
lore: A prized relic long thought lost forever in a failed crusade.

name: Pipe of Insight
description_raw:
Active: Barrier

Gives a magic damage barrier that absorbs %barrier_block% damage to all nearby allies. Lasts %barrier_duration% seconds.

Radius: %barrier_radius%\n\n

Passive: Insight Aura

Gives allied units %magic_resistance_aura%%% magic resistance.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: A powerful artifact of mysterious origin, it creates barriers against magical forces.

name: Urn of Shadows
description_raw:
Active: Soul Release

Provides %soul_heal_amount% health regeneration when cast on allies, and deals %soul_damage_amount% damage per second when cast on enemies.

Lasts %duration% seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within %soul_radius% units.
lore: Contains the ashes of powerful demons.

name: Headdress
description_raw:
Passive: Regeneration Aura

Grants %aura_health_regen% health regeneration to allies.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: Creates a soothing aura that restores allies in battle.

name: Scythe of Vyse
description_raw:
Active: Hex

Turns a target unit into a harmless critter for %sheep_duration% seconds. The target has a base movement speed of %sheep_movement_speed% and will be silenced, muted, and disarmed.
Instantly destroys illusions.
lore: The most guarded relic among the cult of Vyse, it is the most coveted weapon among magi.

name: Orchid Malevolence
description_raw:
Active: Soul Burn

Silences the target unit for %silence_duration% seconds. At the end of the silence, %silence_damage_percent%%% of the damage received while silenced is inflicted as bonus magical damage.
lore: A garnet rod constructed from the essence of a fire demon.

name: Bloodthorn
description_raw:
Active: Soul Rend

Silences a target for %silence_duration% seconds. At the end of the silence, an additional %silence_damage_percent%%% of all damage taken during the silence will be dealt to the target as magical damage.

All attacks on the silenced target will deal additional damage equal to %proc_damage_heroes% if the attacker is a hero, and %proc_damage_creeps%, if the attacker is a creep. Provides True Strike for your attacks and attacks from your controlled units against the silenced target.\n\n

Passive: Pierce

Grants each attack a %proc_chance%%% chance to pierce through evasion and deal %passive_proc_damage% bonus magical damage.
lore: A reviled blade that bites deeper with each wriggle of its victim's final throes.

name: Echo Sabre
description_raw:
Passive: Echo Strike

Causes melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession. The double attacks apply a %movement_slow%%% movement slow for %slow_duration% seconds on the first strike.
lore: A deceptively swift blade imbued with resonant magic.

name: Eul's Scepter of Divinity
description_raw:
Active: Cyclone

Sweeps a target unit up into a cyclone, making them invulnerable for %cyclone_duration% seconds. Cyclone can only be cast on enemy units or yourself.

Enemy units take %tooltip_drop_damage% magical damage upon landing.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: A mysterious scepter passed down through the ages, its disruptive winds can be used for good or evil.

name: Wind Waker
description_raw:
Active: Cyclone

Sweeps a target unit up into a cyclone, making them invulnerable for %cyclone_duration% seconds. Cyclone can be cast on yourself, enemy units or allied units. When cast on yourself, you can move the tornado at a speed of %tornado_speed%.

Enemy units take %tooltip_drop_damage% magical damage upon landing.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: Proof enough to some that unseen forces manipulate the happenings of the material plane.

name: Aether Lens
lore: Polished with the incantation of his final breath, the gift of a dying mage to his sickly son.

name: Force Staff
description_raw:
Active: Force

Pushes any target unit %push_length% units in the direction it is facing.
lore: Allows you to manipulate others, for good or evil.

name: Hurricane Pike
description_raw:
Active: Hurricane Thrust

Pushes you and target enemy %enemy_length% units away from each other, and for %range_duration% seconds, allows you to make %max_attacks% attacks against the target without range restrictions and with +%bonus_attack_speed% attack speed.

Can be cast on self or allies to push the target %push_length% units in the direction it is facing.
Enemy Range: %cast_range_enemy%
lore: A legendary pike once held as royal sigil of the ancient wyvern riders.

name: Dagon
description_raw:
Active: Energy Burst

Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Upgradable.

Damage: %damage%
Mana Cost: %mana_cost_tooltip%
lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

name: Dagon
description_raw:
Active: Energy Burst

Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Upgradable.

Damage: %damage%
Mana Cost: %mana_cost_tooltip%
lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

name: Dagon
description_raw:
Active: Energy Burst

Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Upgradable.

Damage: %damage%
Mana Cost: %mana_cost_tooltip%
lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

name: Dagon
description_raw:
Active: Energy Burst

Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit. Upgradable.

Damage: %damage%
Mana Cost: %mana_cost_tooltip%
lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

name: Dagon
description_raw:
Active: Energy Burst

Emits a powerful burst of magical damage upon a targeted enemy unit.

Damage: %damage%
Mana Cost: %mana_cost_tooltip%
lore: A lesser wand that grows in power the longer it is used, it brings magic to the fingertips of the user.

name: Necronomicon
description_raw:
Active: Demonic Summoning

Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for %summon_duration% seconds.

Warrior:

Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: %warrior_health_tooltip%
Damage: %warrior_damage_tooltip%
Mana Break Damage: %warrior_mana_break_tooltip%
Last Will Damage: %explosion%

Archer:

Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: %archer_health_tooltip%
Damage: %archer_damage_tooltip%
Aura Move Speed: %archer_move_speed%
Aura Radius: %archer_aura_radius_tooltip%
lore: Considered the ultimate in necromancy and demonology, a powerful malefic force is locked within its pages.

name: Necronomicon
description_raw:
Active: Demonic Summoning

Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for %summon_duration% seconds.

Warrior:

Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: %warrior_health_tooltip%
Damage: %warrior_damage_tooltip%
Mana Break Damage: %warrior_mana_break_tooltip%
Last Will Damage: %explosion%

Archer:

Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: %archer_health_tooltip%
Damage: %archer_damage_tooltip%
Aura Move Speed: %archer_move_speed%
Aura Radius: %archer_aura_radius_tooltip%
