Active: Demonic Summoning

Summons a Warrior and an Archer to fight for you for %summon_duration% seconds.

Warrior:

Burns mana every hit, and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. Gains True Sight at level 3.
Health: %warrior_health_tooltip%
Damage: %warrior_damage_tooltip%
Mana Break Damage: %warrior_mana_break_tooltip%
Last Will Damage: %explosion%

Archer:

Has a passive movement and attack speed aura. Gains Purge at Level 3.
Health: %archer_health_tooltip%
Damage: %archer_damage_tooltip%
Aura Move Speed: %archer_move_speed%
Aura Radius: %archer_aura_radius_tooltip%
lore: Considered the ultimate in necromancy and demonology, a powerful malefic force is locked within its pages.

name: Aghanim's Scepter
description_raw:
Passive: Ability Upgrade

Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.
lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

name: Aghanim's Blessing
description_raw:
Passive: Ability Upgrade

Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.
lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

name: Aghanim's Blessing - Roshan
description_raw:
Passive: Ability Upgrade

Upgrades the ultimate, and some abilities, of all heroes.
lore: The scepter of a wizard with demigod-like powers.

name: Aghanim's Shard
description_raw:
Passive: Ability Upgrade

Upgrades an existing ability or adds a new ability to your hero.
lore: With origins known only to a single wizard, fragments of this impossible crystal are nearly as coveted as the renowned scepter itself.

name: Aghanim's Shard - Consumable
description_raw:
Passive: Ability Upgrade

Upgrades an existing ability or adds a new ability to your hero.
lore: With origins known only to a single wizard, fragments of this impossible crystal are nearly as coveted as the renowned scepter itself.

name: Eldwurm's Edda
description_raw:
Passive: Forbidden Knowledge

When consumed, increases Winter Wyvern's base intelligence by %intellect_pct%%% of its current value at the time of consumption, and increases the current and maximum level of a basic ability by one. All values except for Mana Cost scale by 50% of the difference between their existing levels for the additional level

name: Refresher Orb
description_raw:
Active: Reset Cooldowns

Resets the cooldowns of all your abilities. Shares a cooldown with Refresher Shard. This item's cooldown only progresses in your hero's main inventory.
lore: A powerful artifact created for wizards.
shard:
Use: Reset Cooldowns

Resets the cooldowns of all your abilities. Shares a cooldown with Refresher Orb. This item's cooldown only progresses in your hero's main inventory.

name: Assault Cuirass
description_raw:
Passive: Assault Aura

Grants %aura_attack_speed% attack speed and %aura_positive_armor% armor to nearby allied units and structures, and decreases nearby enemy unit and structure armor by %aura_negative_armor%.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: Forged in the depths of the nether reaches, this hellish mail provides an army with increased armor and attack speed.

name: Heart of Tarrasque
description_raw:
Passive: Behemoth's Blood

Your health regeneration is increased by %missing_health_regen%%% of your missing health.
lore: Preserved heart of an extinct monster, it bolsters the bearer's fortitude.

name: Black King Bar
description_raw:
Active: Avatar

Applies a basic dispel. Grants %spell_reduce%%% magic resistance and immunity to reflected and pure damage. For the duration of the effect, any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect.

Duration: %duration%s
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: A powerful staff imbued with the strength of giants.

name: Aegis of the Immortal
description_raw:
Passive: Reincarnation

Brings you to life with full health and mana %reincarnate_time% seconds after you die, at the location where you died.

Reincarnation must be used within %disappear_time_minutes_tooltip% minutes or Aegis of the Immortal disappears. If it expires, it will heal you over 5 seconds (dispels on damage).
lore: The Immortal was said to own a shield that protected him from death itself.

name: Shiva's Guard
description_raw:
Active: Arctic Blast

Emits a freezing wave that deals %blast_damage% magical damage to enemies and slows their movement by %blast_movement_speed%%% for %blast_debuff_duration% seconds.

Radius: %blast_radius%\n\n

Passive: Freezing Aura

Reduces the attack speed of all enemies by %aura_attack_speed%.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: Said to have belonged to a goddess, today it retains much of its former power.

name: Bloodstone
description_raw:
Active: Bloodpact

Increases Bloodstone's Spell Lifesteal to %spell_lifesteal_while_active%%%. Lasts %buff_duration% seconds. \n\n

Passive: Spell Weakness Aura

Enemy units take %aura_spell_vulnerability%%% increased damage from spells.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: The Bloodstone's bright ruby color is unmistakable on the battlefield, as the owner seems to have infinite vitality and spirit.

name: Linken's Sphere
description_raw:
Passive: Spellblock

Blocks most targeted spells once every %block_cooldown% seconds.\n\n

Active: Transfer Spellblock

Temporarily removes Spellblock from the item's owner and transfers it to an allied unit for %block_cooldown% seconds.
lore: This magical sphere once protected one of the most famous heroes in history.

name: Lotus Orb
description_raw:
Active: Echo Shell

Applies a shield to the target unit for %active_duration% seconds which re-casts most targeted spells back to their caster.

The shielded unit will still take damage from the spell.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: The jewel at its center still reflects a pale image of its creator.

name: Meteor Hammer
description_raw:
Active: Meteor Hammer

CHANNELED - After a successful channel, summons a meteor that strikes a %impact_radius% AoE, stunning enemies for %stun_duration% seconds and dealing impact damage. Continues to deal damage over time to enemies units and buildings for %burn_duration% seconds. Non-building units are also slowed for %burn_slow%%% for the duration of the burn.

Building Impact Damage: %impact_damage_buildings%
Building Over Time Damage: %burn_dps_buildings%

Non-Building Impact Damage: %impact_damage_units%
Non-Building Over Time Damage: %burn_dps_units%

Channel Duration: %max_duration% seconds.
Landing Time: %land_time% seconds.
lore: An enchanted hammer forged of metals discovered in the ruins of a village destroyed by a great star storm.

name: Nullifier
description_raw:
Active: Nullify

Dispels the target and applies a debuff for %mute_duration% seconds. Continuously dispels and slows the target.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: A dangerous weapon pilfered from an inverse dimension.

name: Aeon Disk
description_raw:
Passive: Combo Breaker

When you take damage and your health falls below %health_threshold_pct%%%, a strong dispel is applied and you gain a %buff_duration% second buff that provides +%status_resistance%%% Status Resistance and causes all damage you deal and are dealt to be reduced to zero. Only triggers on player based damage. Cooldown increases every time it triggers.

Dispel Type: Strong Dispel
lore: A powerful artifact long ago smuggled out of the Ivory Incubarium. Or so many believe.

name: Kaya
lore: The staff of a renowned sorceress, lost for countless millennia.

name: Trident
description_raw: Combines Sange, Yasha and Kaya together.

name: Refresher Shard
description_raw:
Use: Reset Cooldowns

Resets the cooldowns of all your abilities. Shares a cooldown with Refresher Orb. This item's cooldown only progresses in your hero's main inventory.
lore: Across an epoch of endless battle, the Immortal's will to triumph never faltered.

name: Spirit Vessel
description_raw:
Active: Soul Release

When used against enemies, it reduces health by %enemy_hp_drain%%% of current health per second, and reduces Health Restoration by %restoration_reduction_enemy%%%. Deals %soul_damage_amount% damage per second.

When used on allies, it provides %soul_heal_amount% health regeneration per second.

Lasts %duration% seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within %soul_radius% units or the user dies.
lore: Forged by a god to entrap the soul of another.

name: Essence Distiller
description_raw:
Active: Soul Release

Provides %soul_heal_amount% health regeneration when cast on allies.

Can be ground targeted to lie dormant for up to %ground_duration%s and attach to the first enemy that comes within %latch_range% radius. When on enemies, deals %soul_damage_amount% damage per second and provides True Sight over them and shares their vision with the wearer's team.

Lasts %duration% seconds.

Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within %soul_radius% units.

name: Vanguard
description_raw:
Passive: Damage Block

Grants a %block_chance%%% chance to block %block_damage_melee% damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and %block_damage_ranged% damage on ranged.
lore: A powerful shield that defends its wielder from even the most vicious of attacks.

name: Crimson Guard
description_raw:
Active: Guard

For %duration% seconds, grant nearby allied heroes and buildings a %block_chance_active%%% chance to block damage equal to %block_damage_active% plus %max_hp_pct%%% of the caster's max health value from each incoming attack.

Radius: %bonus_aoe_radius%\n\n

Passive: Damage Block

Grants a %block_chance%%% chance to block %block_damage_melee% damage from incoming attacks on melee heroes, and %block_damage_ranged% damage on ranged.
lore: A cuirass originally built to protect against the dreaded Year Beast.

name: Blade Mail
description_raw:
Active: Damage Return

For %duration% seconds, return all incoming damage, increasing the percentage by %active_reflection_pct%%%.\n\n

Passive: Damage Return

Everytime you are attacked, you return %passive_reflection_constant% damage plus %passive_reflection_pct%%% of the attack damage dealt to you.
lore: A razor-sharp coat of mail, it is the choice of selfless martyrs in combat.

name: Soul Booster
lore: Regain lost courage.

name: Hood of Defiance
description_raw:
Active: Barrier

Creates a spell shield that absorbs up to %barrier_block% magical damage. Lasts %barrier_duration% seconds.
lore: A furred, magic resistant headpiece that is feared by wizards.

name: Eternal Shroud
description_raw:
Passive: Shroud

Restores mana equal to %mana_restore_pct%%% of incoming enemy spell damage before reductions.\n\n

Passive: Eternal Endurance

For every %stack_threshold% spell damage that equipped hero receives, it gains a stack of Endurance for %stack_duration%s up to a maximum of %max_stacks% charges. Each charge increases Eternal Shroud's magic resistance by %stack_resist%%% .
lore: A pristine hood that feeds upon strife to empower its owner.

name: Consecrated Wraps
description_raw:
Passive: Hallowed

Gain a charge every %AbilityChargeRestoreTime%s, up to a maximum of %AbilityCharges% charges. Upon gaining a charge, your movement speed is increased by %movement_speed_pct_on_stack_gain%%% for %duration%s.

Whenever you take damage from a player-controlled unit or Roshan, consume all charges to gain an all damage barrier for %duration%s that absorbs %barrier_per_stack% damage per charge (%max_barrier_tooltip% max).

name: Crella's Crozier
description_raw:
Active: Rite of Rumusque

You enter ghost form for %duration% seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but are unable to attack and %extra_spell_damage_percent%%% more vulnerable to magic damage.

Steal %movespeed_steal_pct%%% movement speed from enemy heroes in %active_radius% range every second. Movement speed steal lasts %stack_duration%s.

Putrefaction Aura's effect is increased to %active_health_steal%%%. All of the lost Health Restoration is redirected to you every second.\n\n

Passive: Putrefaction Aura

Reduces nearby enemy heroes' Health Restoration by %health_steal%%%.

Radius: %radius%

name: Divine Rapier
description_raw:
Toggle: Transmute

Toggle to gain either %bonus_spell_amp%%% bonus spell amplification or %bonus_damage% bonus attack damage.\n\n

Passive: Everlasting

Dropped on death, and cannot be destroyed.

Becomes unusable if picked up by an ally of its owner until it is returned to its owner. It is immediately usable by anybody if an enemy of the owner picks it up and is killed. A dropped Rapier cannot be picked up by a courier.
lore: So powerful, it cannot have a single owner.

name: Monkey King Bar
description_raw:
Passive: Pierce

Grants each attack a %bonus_chance%%% chance to pierce through evasion and deal %bonus_chance_damage% bonus magical damage.
lore: A powerful staff used by a master warrior.

name: Radiance
description_raw:
Toggle: Burn

When active, scorches enemies for %aura_damage% magical damage per second. Illusions deal %aura_damage_illusions% magical damage per second.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: A divine weapon that causes damage and a bright burning effect that lays waste to nearby enemies.

name: Butterfly
lore: Only the mightiest and most experienced of warriors can wield the Butterfly, but it provides incredible dexterity in combat.

name: Daedalus
description_raw:
Passive: Critical Strike

Grants each attack a %crit_chance%%% chance to deal %crit_multiplier%%% damage.
lore: A weapon of incredible power that is difficult for even the strongest of warriors to control.

name: Skull Basher
description_raw:
Passive: Bash

Grants melee heroes a %bash_chance_melee%%% chance on hit to stun the target for %bash_duration% seconds and deal %bonus_chance_damage% bonus physical damage. Bash chance for ranged heroes is %bash_chance_ranged%%%.
lore: A feared weapon in the right hands, this maul's ability to shatter the defenses of its opponents should not be underestimated.

name: Battle Fury
description_raw:
Active: Chop Tree

Destroy a target tree.

Passive: Quell

Increases attack damage against non-hero units by %quelling_bonus% for melee heroes, and %quelling_bonus_ranged% for ranged.

Passive: Cleave

Deals %cleave_damage_percent%%% of attack damage as physical damage in a cone up to %cleave_distance% around the target. Deals %cleave_damage_percent_creep%%% against creeps. (Melee Only)
lore: The bearer of this mighty axe gains the ability to cut down swaths of enemies at once.

name: Manta Style
description_raw:
Active: Mirror Image

Creates %images_count% images of your hero that last %illusion_duration% seconds.

Melee images deal %tooltip_damage_outgoing_melee%%% damage, while Ranged images deal %tooltip_damage_outgoing_ranged%%%. Illusions take %tooltip_damage_incoming_total_pct%%% damage.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: An axe made of reflective materials that causes confusion amongst enemy ranks.

name: Crystalys
description_raw:
Passive: Critical Strike

Grants each attack a %crit_chance%%% chance to deal %crit_multiplier%%% damage.
lore: A blade forged from rare crystals, it seeks weak points in enemy armor.

name: Dragon Lance
lore: The forward charge of the wyvern host grants no quarter.

name: Armlet of Mordiggian
description_raw:
Toggle: Unholy Strength

When active, Unholy Strength grants +%unholy_bonus_damage% damage, +%unholy_bonus_strength% strength and +%unholy_bonus_armor% armor, but drains %unholy_health_drain_per_second% health per second.

You cannot die from the health drain when Unholy Strength is activated, nor from the strength loss when Unholy Strength is deactivated.
lore: Weapon of choice among brutes, the bearer sacrifices his life energy to gain immense strength and power.

name: Shadow Blade
description_raw:
Active: Shadow Walk

Makes you invisible for %windwalk_duration% seconds, or until you attack or cast a spell. While Shadow Walk is active, you move %windwalk_movement_speed%%% faster and can move through units.

If attacking to end the invisibility, you gain %windwalk_bonus_damage% bonus physical damage on that attack.
lore: The blade of a fallen king, it allows you to move unseen and strike from the shadows.

name: Silver Edge
description_raw:
Active: Shadow Walk

Makes you invisible for %windwalk_duration% seconds, or until you attack or cast a spell. While invisible, you move %windwalk_movement_speed%%% faster and can move through units.

Attacking to end the invisibility will deal %windwalk_bonus_damage% bonus physical damage, disable their passive abilities for %backstab_duration% seconds, and cap their movement speed to %max_movement_speed%.\n\n
lore: Once used to slay an unjust king, only to have the kingdom erupt into civil war in the aftermath.

name: Sange and Yasha
lore: Sange and Yasha, when attuned by the moonlight and used together, become a very powerful combination.

name: Kaya and Sange
lore: Two of three known items of unimaginable power that many believe were crafted at the same enchanter's forge.

name: Yasha and Kaya
lore: Yasha and Kaya when paired together share a natural resonance.

name: Satanic
description_raw:
Active: Unholy Rage

Increases Lifesteal percentage to %unholy_lifesteal_total_tooltip%%% for %unholy_duration% seconds.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel \n\n

Passive: Lifesteal

Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.
lore: Immense power at the cost of your soul.

name: Mjollnir
description_raw:
Active: Static Charge

Places a charged shield on a target unit for %static_duration% seconds which has a %static_chance%%% chance to release a %static_damage% magical damage shocking bolt at a nearby attacker and %static_strikes% additional enemies.\n\n

Passive: Chain Lightning

Grants a %chain_chance%%% chance on attack to release a bolt of electricity that leaps between %chain_strikes% targets within a %chain_radius% radius, dealing %chain_damage% magical damage to each. Lightning proc pierces evasion.
lore: Thor's magical hammer, made for him by the dwarves Brok and Eitri.

name: Eye of Skadi
description_raw:
Passive: Cold Attack

Attacks lower enemy movement by %cold_slow_melee%%% if they are melee and %cold_slow_ranged%%% if they are ranged. Attacks also lower enemy attack speed by %cold_attack_slow_melee%%% and Health Restoration by %restoration_reduction%%%. Lasts for %cold_duration% seconds.
lore: Extremely rare artifact, guarded by the azure dragons.

name: Sange
lore: Sange is an unusually accurate weapon, seeking weak points automatically.

name: Helm of the Dominator
description_raw:
Active: Dominate

Takes control of one neutral, non-ancient target unit and sets its movement speed to %speed_base% and max health to a minimum of %health_min%. Also provides the unit with +%creep_bonus_damage% base attack damage, +%creep_bonus_hp_regen% health regen, +%creep_bonus_mp_regen% mana regen and +%creep_bonus_armor% armor.

Dominated units with a max health of greater than %health_min% retain their original max health. Grants the caster %bounty_pct%%% of the gold and experience bounty of the dominated creep. Dominated unit's bounty is set to %bounty_gold% gold and it can no longer be killed by abilities that instantly kill creeps otherwise.

The Helm cannot be used for %creep_damage_taken_cooldown% seconds after the dominated creep takes damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: The powerful headpiece of a dead necromancer.

name: Helm of the Overlord
description_raw:
Active: Dominate

Takes control of one neutral target unit and sets its movement speed to %speed_base% and max health to a minimum of %health_min%. Also provides the unit with +%creep_bonus_damage% base attack damage, +%creep_bonus_hp_regen% health regen, +%creep_bonus_mp_regen% mana regen, +%creep_bonus_armor% armor, and levels up some abilities of the target by 1 level.

Dominated units with a max health of greater than %health_min% retain their original max health. Grants the caster the gold and experience bounty of the dominated creep. Dominated unit's bounty is set to %bounty_gold% gold and it can no longer be killed by abilities that instantly kill creeps otherwise.

The Helm cannot be used for %creep_damage_taken_cooldown% seconds after the dominated creep takes damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: The powerful headpiece of an undead necromancer.

name: Maelstrom
description_raw:
Passive: Chain Lightning

Grants a %chain_chance%%% chance on attack to release a bolt of electricity that leaps between %chain_strikes% targets within a %chain_radius% radius, dealing %chain_damage% magical damage to each. Lightning proc pierces evasion.
lore: A hammer forged for the gods themselves, Maelstrom allows its user to harness the power of lightning.

name: Gleipnir
description_raw:
Active: Eternal Chains

Roots all enemies in a %radius_tooltip% radius for %duration% seconds.
lore: Bindings forged by impossible means to leash an ancient evil.

name: Desolator
description_raw:
Passive: Corruption

Your attacks reduce the target's armor by %corruption_armor% for %corruption_duration% seconds.\n\n

Passive: Soul Stealer

Desolator gains +%bonus_damage_per_kill% damage every time an enemy hero dies while affected by Corruption, to a maximum of %max_damage%.
lore: A wicked weapon, used in torturing political criminals.

name: Yasha
lore: Yasha is regarded as the swiftest weapon ever created.

name: Mask of Madness
description_raw:
Active: Berserk

Gives %berserk_bonus_attack_speed% attack speed, %berserk_bonus_movement_speed%%% / %berserk_bonus_movement_speed_melee%%% movement speed (ranged/melee), and %berserk_slow_resist%%% slow resistance, but reduces your armor by %berserk_armor_reduction% and silences you. Lasts %berserk_duration% seconds.\n\n

Passive: Lifesteal

Heals the attacker for a percentage of physical damage dealt.
lore: Once this mask is worn, its bearer becomes an uncontrollable aggressive force.

name: Diffusal Blade
description_raw:
Active: Inhibit

Targets an enemy, slowing it for %purge_slow_duration% seconds.\n\n

Passive: Manabreak

Each attack burns %feedback_mana_burn% mana from the target, and deals %damage_per_burn% physical damage per burned mana.

Illusions do not burn mana.
lore: An enchanted blade that allows the user to cut straight into the enemy's soul.

name: Disperser
description_raw:
Active: Suppress

Dispels both the wearer and the target. Enemy targets are slowed for %enemy_effect_duration% seconds. Allied targets gain bonus movespeed and %slow_resist%%% slow resistance for %ally_effect_duration% seconds. Caster is always granted the ally benefit on cast.

Both movement speed reduction and increase start at %phase_movement_speed%%% and gradually decrease to 0% over the course of the buff duration.
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel\n\n

Passive: Manabreak

Each attack burns %feedback_mana_burn% mana from the target, and deals %damage_per_burn% physical damage per burned mana.

Illusions do not burn mana.
lore: Once entrusted to an Apostle General of the Rumusque Faithful's expeditionary force.

name: Ethereal Blade
description_raw:
Active: Ether Blast

Converts the target unit to ethereal form, rendering them immune to physical damage, but unable to attack and %ethereal_damage_bonus%%% more vulnerable to magic damage.

Enemy targets are also slowed by %blast_movement_slow%%%, and take %blast_stat_multiplier%x the sum of all your attributes + %blast_damage_base% as magical damage.
Duration: %duration% seconds
lore: A flickering blade of a ghastly nature, it is capable of dealing damage in both magical and physical planes.

name: Soul Ring
description_raw:
Active: Sacrifice

Consume %AbilityHealthCost% health to temporarily gain %mana_gain% mana. Lasts %duration% seconds.

If the mana gained cannot fit in your mana pool, it creates a buffer of mana that will be used before your mana pool.
lore: A ring that feeds on the souls of those who wear it.

name: Arcane Boots
description_raw:
Active: Replenish

Restores %replenish_amount% mana to all nearby allies.

Radius: %replenish_radius%

Passive: Basilius Aura

Grants %aura_mana_regen% mana regeneration to allies.

Radius: %aura_radius% Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Magi equipped with these boots are valued in battle.

name: Octarine Core
lore: At the core of spellcraft are spectrums only the very gifted can sense.

name: Orb of Venom
description_raw:
Passive: Poison Attack

Poisons the target, dealing %damage% magical damage per second. Lasts for %poison_duration% seconds.
lore: Envenoms your veapon with the venom of a venomous viper.

name: Orb of Blight
description_raw:
Passive: Lesser Corruption

Your attacks reduce the target's armor by %corruption_armor% for %corruption_duration% seconds.
lore: An unnerving stone unearthed beneath the Fields of Endless Carnage.

name: Orb of Corrosion
description_raw:
Passive: Corrosion

Your attacks reduce the target's armor by %corruption_armor%, slows their movement by %slow_ranged%%% (%slow_melee%%% against melee targets), and reduces Health Restoration by %heal_reduction%%%. Lasts for %duration% seconds.
lore: Seepage from the wounds of a warrior deity, sealed in an arcanist's orb following a campaign of vicious slaughter.

name: Orb of Frost
description_raw:
Passive: Frost

Your attacks slow the target's movement by %slow_ranged%%% (%slow_melee%%% against melee targets), and reduces Health Restoration by %heal_reduction%%%. Lasts for %duration% seconds.
lore: Slowly growing since the universe began, it will envelop everything when it ends.

name: Falcon Blade
lore: An enchanted blade that long ago raised a hopeless urchin from pauper to king.

name: Mage Slayer
description_raw:
Passive: Mage Slayer

Places a debuff when you attack enemies, dealing %dps% physical damage per second and causing them to do %spell_amp_debuff%%% less spell damage for %duration% seconds.
lore: Forged by a secret order in The Third Age of Praxa'cia to fell the False King.

name: Drum of Endurance
description_raw:
Active: Endurance

Gives +%bonus_attack_speed_pct% attack speed and +%bonus_movement_speed_pct%%% movement speed to nearby allies for %duration% seconds.

Radius: %radius% \n\n

Passive: Swiftness Aura

Grants %aura_movement_speed% movement speed and %aura_health_regen% health regeneration to allies.

Radius: %radius%
lore: A relic that enchants the bodies of those around it for swifter movement in times of crisis.

name: Boots of Bearing
description_raw:
Active: Endurance

Gives +%bonus_attack_speed_pct% attack speed and +%bonus_movement_speed_pct%%% movement speed to nearby allies for %duration% seconds. For the first %bonus_ms_duration% seconds allies are immune to slows.

Radius: %radius%

Passive: Swiftness Aura

Grants %aura_movement_speed% movement speed and %aura_health_regen% health regeneration to allies.

Radius: %radius% Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Resplendent footwear fashioned for the ancient herald that first dared spread the glory of Stonehall beyond the original borders of its nascent claim.

description_raw:
Active: Valor

Increases armor by %ally_armor% or decreases armor by %enemy_armor% for %duration%s depending on if cast on an ally or enemy. Cannot be cast on self.

name: Solar Crest
description_raw:
Active: Shine

When cast on an ally, grants them %target_armor% armor, %target_attack_speed% attack speed, %target_movement_speed%%% movement speed and a %absorb_amount% physical damage barrier.

Does not grant bonus armor, movement or attack speed if used on self.

Duration: %duration%
lore: A talisman forged to honor the daytime sky.

name: Pavise
description_raw:
Active: Protect

When cast on an ally, grants them a physical damage barrier that absorbs %absorb_amount% damage. Duration: %duration%s.
lore: Devised by a wizard who made one too many enemies.

name: Smoke of Deceit
description_raw:
Use: Disguise

Turns the caster and all allied player-controlled units in a %application_radius% radius invisible, and grants %bonus_movement_speed%%% bonus movement speed for %duration% seconds.

While the caster is still disguised, any allies that come within %secondary_application_radius% range of them will also get the buff applied to them. Each smoke can only be applied once to allies.

Attacking or moving within %visibility_radius% range of an enemy hero or tower, will break the invisibility.

Disguise grants invisibility that is immune to True Sight.

Smoke of Deceit is usable from the backpack and has no cooldown when swapped into the main inventory.
lore: The charlatan wizard Myrddin's only true contribution to the arcane arts.

name: Tome of Knowledge
description_raw:
Use: Enlighten

Grants you %xp_bonus% experience plus %xp_per_use% per tome consumed by your team after the first two.

Tomes Used By Team: %customval_team_tomes_used%
lore: That which raises beast to man and man to god.

name: Veil of Discord
description_raw:
Active: Spell Weakness

Cast a %debuff_radius% radius blast that causes enemy heroes to take %spell_amp%%% increased damage from spells.

Can be cast while channeling.

Duration: %resist_debuff_duration% seconds.
lore: The headwear of corrupt magi.

name: Revenant's Brooch
description_raw:
Passive: Phantom Critical

Grants each attack a %crit_chance%%% chance to deal an additional %crit_multiplier%%% of the attack's damage as bonus magic damage.
lore: The cursed brooch of a fallen guardian who stalks forever between the veil of life and death.

name: Parasma
description_raw:
Passive: Witch Blade

Causes your next attack to have true strike, apply a poison for %slow_duration% seconds, slowing by %slow%%% and dealing %int_damage_multiplier%x your intelligence as damage every second.\n\n

Passive: Magic Corruption

Your attacks reduce the enemy's Magic resistance by %active_mres_reduction%%% for %passive_cooldown% seconds.
lore: Warning: There is no antidote if picked up by the wrong end.

name: Guardian Greaves
description_raw:
Active: Mend

Restores %replenish_health% health and %replenish_mana% mana to nearby allies, and removes most negative effects from the caster.

Radius: %replenish_radius%
Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

Passive: Guardian Aura

Grants %aura_health_regen% health regeneration and %aura_mana_regen% mana regeneration to allied units. If the wearer's health falls below %aura_bonus_threshold%%%, their health regeneration is increased to %aura_health_regen_bonus%.

Radius: %aura_radius% Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: One of many holy instruments constructed to honor the Omniscience.

name: Rod of Atos
description_raw:
Active: Cripple

Roots the target for %duration% seconds.
lore: Atos, the Lord of Blight, has his essence stored in this deceptively simple wand.

description_raw:
Active: Chop

Targets a non-player enemy unit to remove %creep_damage_pct%%% of its current HP.

If cast on a tree, instantly destroys it.
lore: A simple but effective weapon devised to quell a great Hellbear uprising.

name: Abyssal Blade
description_raw:
Active: Overwhelm

Stuns a target enemy unit for %stun_duration% seconds.

Pierces Debuff Immunity.\n\n

Passive: Bash

Grants melee heroes a %bash_chance_melee%%% chance on hit to stun the target for %bash_duration% seconds and deal %bonus_chance_damage% bonus physical damage. Bash chance for ranged heroes is %bash_chance_ranged%%%.
lore: The lost blade of the Commander of the Abyss, this edge cuts into an enemy's soul.

name: Heaven's Halberd
description_raw:
Active: Disarm

Prevents a target from attacking for %disarm_melee% seconds.
lore: This halberd moves with the speed of a smaller weapon, allowing the bearer to win duels that a heavy edge would not.

name: Ring of Aquila
description_raw:
Passive: Aquila Aura

Grants %aura_mana_regen% mana regeneration and %aura_bonus_armor% armor to nearby allies.

Radius: %aura_radius%\n

Toggle: Aura

Deactivate to stop affecting non-hero units.
lore: The ring of the fallen Warlord Aquila continues to support armies in battle.

name: Tranquil Boots
description_raw:
Passive: Break

Whenever you attack a hero or are attacked by any unit, the bonus %bonus_health_regen% HP regen is lost and the movement speed bonus is reduced to %broken_movement_speed% for %break_time% seconds.\nMovement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: While they increase the longevity of the wearer, this boot is not particularly reliable.

name: Shadow Amulet
description_raw:
Active: Fade

Grants invisibility to you or a target allied hero for %fade_duration%s. Movement speed during the invisibility is reduced by %movement_speed_reduction%%%.
lore: A small talisman that clouds the senses of one's enemies when held perfectly still.

name: Glimmer Cape
description_raw:
Active: Glimmer

After a %initial_fade_delay% second delay, grants invisibility, %active_movement_speed% movement speed and a magic damage barrier that absorbs up to %barrier_block% damage to you or a target allied unit for %duration% seconds.

Can be cast while channeling.
lore: The stolen cape of a master illusionist.

name: Keen Optic
lore: Stolen from a tinker's shop ages ago, this handy lens has seen service to many owners.

name: Grove Bow
description_raw:
Passive: Magic Amp

Reduces magic resistance of the attacked enemy by %magic_resistance_reduction%%%.
lore: A gift from the moon goddess to one of her prized disciples many memories ago.

name: Quickening Charm
description_raw:
Passive: Cooldown Reduction

Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and items.
lore: An evergreen amulet of druidic origins.

name: Philosopher's Stone
lore: A weightless charm created by an enchanter with a powerful scorn for brute force.

name: Force Boots
description_raw:
Active: Force

Pushes the target %push_length% units in the direction they are facing. Dispels if cast on an ally.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel

Passive: Speed Unlock

Completely removes the speed limit for the wearer Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.
lore: Elusive marvels never successfully studied for proper classification in the archives.

description_raw:
Passive: Greater Corruption

Your attacks reduce the target's armor by %corruption_armor% for %corruption_duration% seconds.
lore: The original demonic favorite that served as basis for the beloved mortal design.

name: Phoenix Ash
description_raw:
Passive: Rebirth

Lethal damage is prevented and instead the wearer is healed to half health and non-ultimate ability cooldowns reset. Gets consumed on trigger.

name: Seer Stone
description_raw:
Active: Reveal

Reveal a target %radius% area of the map for %duration% seconds.
lore: The curious creation of a wizard who professed to hail from another time.

name: Elixir
description_raw:
Use: Consume

Restores %health% health and %mana% mana to the target over %duration% seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

name: Arcanist's Armor
description_raw:
Active: Mega Shield

Force Field Aura Grants %active_reflection_pct%%% Damage Reflection for 5 seconds.\n\n

Passive: Shield

Grants +%bonus_aoe_armor% armor and +%bonus_aoe_mres%%% Magic Resistance to all other allies within %bonus_aoe_radius% radius.
lore: An exquisite piece commissioned by a paranoid monarch who choked on a piece of fruit long before the item saw its intended use.

name: Blast Rig
description_raw:
Passive: Hair Trigger

The next time you get attacked by a hero within %radius% range, explode dealing %damage% damage to all enemies within a %radius% radius and causing them to miss %blind_pct%%% of their attacks for %blind_duration% seconds.
lore: One of a set of custom rigs once worn by infamous road agents in the Outlands, its siblings have been lost to misfires and the various tides of time.

name: Craggy Coat
description_raw:
Active: Toughen Up

Grants you an extra %active_armor% bonus armor at the cost of -%move_speed% movement speed. Lasts %active_duration% seconds.

name: Greater Faerie Fire
description_raw:
Use: Imbue

Instantly restores %hp_restore% health.

name: Timeless Relic
description_raw: Increases all outgoing spell damage and debuff duration.
lore: An unmarred discovery from the excavated ruins of an ancient wizard's academy.

name: Mirror Shield
description_raw:
Passive: Echo Shield

Block and reflect most targeted spells back to their caster once every %block_cooldown% seconds.
lore: The shield that long ago robbed the old one of his first memories.

name: Ironwood Tree
description_raw:
Use: Plant Tree

Targets the ground to plant a happy little tree that lasts for %tree_duration% seconds.
lore: Precious. And hearty as a weed.

name: Mango Tree
description_raw:
Use: Plant a Mango Tree

Targets the ground to plant a mango tree that provides unlimited mango power. The tree generates Enchanted Mangoes every %seconds% seconds, and provides unobstructed vision in the area .

name: Royal Jelly
description_raw:
Active: Consume

Consumes all charges and grants a target allied unit a buff that provides +%health_regen% Health Regen and +%mana_regen% Mana Regen per charge for %regen_duration%s.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.
lore: To those who harvest olgru jelly, success serves more than mere profit--it's often the means to survival--for only the jelly itself can cure the ravages that follow a sting from the vigilant denizens of the giant hives.

name: Pupil's Gift
description_raw: Increases both non-primary attributes.
lore: An astounding plate of ever-replenishing, fortifying fruit.

name: Tome of Aghanim
description_raw:
Use: Consume

Temporarily grants an allied target the Aghanim's Scepter buff for %duration_minutes% minutes.

name: Repair Kit
description_raw:
Use: Building Repair

Targets a building, restoring %heal_percent%%% of it's health over %duration% seconds. Also grants +%armor_bonus% armor during this period.

Passive: Silence Strike

The next attack silences the hit enemy for %duration% seconds.
lore: A bewitching blade of indeterminate form capable of piercing the psyche of even the most willful foe.

name: Third Eye
description_raw:
Passive: True Sight

Grants the ability to see invisible units and wards to any allied vision within %truesight_radius% range of its carrier. \n

Passive: Charge Loss

Loses a charge on death. After all charges are lost, the item disappears.

name: Spell Prism
description_raw:
Passive: Cooldown Reduction

Reduces the cooldown time of all spells and items.
lore: Even the slightest flaw in the components of a spell prism can result in the death of its user.

name: Prince's Knife
description_raw:
Passive: Hex Strike

The next attack hexes the hit enemy into a frog for %duration% seconds.

name: Witless Shako
description_raw: Increases the wearer's max health, while reducing their max mana.

name: Imp Claw
description_raw:
Passive: Critical Strike

Empowers your next attack, causing it to be a critical strike dealing %crit_multiplier%%% damage.
lore: Though their tasks are largely thankless, demon hunters can often turn a profit bartering parts in Weeping Rose.

name: Flicker
description_raw:
Active: Flicker

Dispells debuffs and blinks you in a random forward direction for a random distance between %min_range% and %max_range%. If cast within 3 seconds of receiving player damage, it will blink in place.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: The technically-true-to-his-word 'teleportation device' crafted by a notorious fae trickster.

name: Telescope
description_raw:
Passive: Prescient Aura

Lowers Scan cooldown by %scan_cooldown_reduction%%% . Increases attack range (Ranged only) and cast range of allies in a %aura_range% unit radius.
lore: A handy tool that manages to make close what once was far.

description_raw:
Active: Skitter

Grants you %bonus_movement_speed_active%%% bonus movement speed, %turn_rate%%% improved turn rate, and free pathing for %duration% seconds. Walking over trees causes them to be destroyed.
lore: A horrifying yet useful mixture of necromancy and artificing.

description_raw:
Passive: Death Delay

Survive for an extra %duration% seconds after receiving a killing blow. If any enemy heroes dies within %kill_radius% units, the death delay effect is extended by %bonus_kill_duration% seconds. The hero cannot attack buildings during Death Delay.
lore: The price for wearing it is paid in the afterlife.

name: Vambrace
description_raw:
Active: Switch Attributes

Activate to switch the active attribute between Strength, Agility, and Intelligence. Vambrace provides +%bonus_primary_stat% of the selected attribute and +%bonus_secondary_stat% of the other two attributes.
lore: The coveted treasure that divided the heirs of Queen Raiya upon her death, resulting in the eventual downfall of her kingdom.

name: Fusion Rune
description_raw:
Use: Consume

Grants the target the bonuses of every Power Rune for %duration% seconds. Each use consumes a charge.

name: Ocean Heart
description_raw:
Passive: Water Regen

Provides you with %water_hp_regen% HP regen and %water_mp_regen% mana regen while in the river.
lore: A charm blessed by the Council of the Brine.

description_raw:
Passive: Courage

Provides %damage% damage when the hero is above %health_pct%%% Health, and %armor% armor when they are below that threshold.
lore: A common battle charm in the armies that served the Children of Light.

name: Broom Handle
lore: The surprisingly dangerous creation of an apprentice sorcerer with a strange fondness for brooms.

description_raw:
Active: Dig

Channel for %abilitychanneltime% second.
Can find a Bounty Rune, a Healing Salve, an Enchanted Mango, or a Kobold. If digging in a river, always digs up a Water Rune.
lore: Former plaything of a young deity, received as a gift from his uncle.

name: Nether Shawl
lore: An otherworldly garment tethered to our plane by unknown means.

name: Dragon Scale
description_raw:
Passive: Afterburn

Causes attacks to burn the enemy, dealing %damage_per_sec% damage per second for %duration% seconds. Affects buildings.
lore: The remains of a dragon always outvalue the wealth of even the most prodigious hoard.

description_raw:
Active: Life Essence

Increases your current and max health by %health_gain% for %health_gain_duration% seconds.
lore: An ancient bauble blessed by the breath of Verodicia.

name: Clumsy Net
description_raw:
Active: Ensnare

Ensnares the target enemy and yourself for %duration% seconds.

name: Enchanted Quiver
description_raw:
Passive: Certain Strike

Empowers your next attack with %bonus_damage% bonus magical damage and True Strike. Ranged Attackers have +%active_bonus_attack_range% bonus range for the attack.
lore: A graceful gift blessed by the goddess of the hunt.

description_raw:
Active: Solitary Disguise

Casts Smoke of Deceit on yourself only that lasts for up to %duration% seconds.
lore: Valuable equipment recovered by a young explorer sifting through the flotsam and detritus drifting in the void.

name: Illusionist's Cape
description_raw:
Active: Create Illusion

Creates an image under your control. \n

Passive: Illusion Mastery

Increases outgoing damage of all units and illusions controlled by the hero by %attack_damage_aura%%%.
lore: A dashing cape whose creator insists on calling 'Cloak of Apparition' as opposed to his assistant's 'Illusion' drivel.

name: Havoc Hammer
description_raw:
Active: Havoc

Pulls enemies in a %range% range around you, slowing them by %slow%%% for %slow_duration% seconds and dealing %nuke_base_dmg% + %nuke_str_dmg%x your str as magical damage.

Passive: Rejuvenate

When the wearer's health falls below %health_threshold%%%, they will receive a strong dispel and be healed for %heal% health.

Dispel Type: Strong Dispel

name: Apex
lore: Three orbs of remarkable power bound within a single scepter.

name: Ballista
description_raw:
Passive: Knockback

Knocks back enemies %knockback_distance% distance and deals %bonus_damage% pure damage with every attack.
lore: A simple design much improved by a master smith's loving hand.

name: Woodland Striders
description_raw:
Active: Woodland Stride

Create a path of trees behind you for %active_duration% seconds. Trees last up to %tree_duration% seconds.

Passive: Tree Walking

Removes movement speed limit and allows free pathing through trees. Movement speed bonuses from multiple pairs of boots do not stack.

Active: Greater Demonic Summoning

Summon 2 demonic warriors and 2 demonic archers that last %summon_duration% seconds. The Warrior burns mana every hit and deals magical damage to whoever kills it. The Archer has a basic dispel ability with a slow and a passive movement speed aura.
lore: A record of the final reckoning. With one page torn out.

description_raw:
Active: Fallen Sky

Transform into a meteor that strikes down at the target area after %land_time% seconds in a %impact_radius% AoE, stunning enemies for %stun_duration% seconds and dealing impact damage. Continues to deal damage every %burn_interval% seconds to enemy units and buildings for %burn_duration% seconds.

Building Impact Damage: %impact_damage_buildings%
Building Over Time Damage: %burn_dps_buildings%

Non-Building Impact Damage: %impact_damage_units%
Non-Building Over Time Damage: %burn_dps_units%

Fallen Sky cannot be used for %blink_damage_cooldown% seconds after taking damage from an enemy hero or Roshan.
lore: One of the few surviving creations of the acolytes of the Wyrmforge.

description_raw:
Passive: Plunder

Steals %gold_steal_base% gold from enemy heroes that die within %gold_steal_range% units. If the wearer is the killer, there is no range limit and an additional %gold_steal_kill% gold is stolen.\n

Passive: Buried Treasure

Gold loss on death reduced by %gold_loss_reduction%%%.
lore: A salty skulltopper cursed with endless good fortune.

name: Ex Machina
description_raw:
Active: Reset Cooldowns

Reset the cooldown on all items (except Refresher Orb).
lore: The remains of an ancient universe, preserved within a single sphere.

name: Faded Broach
lore: A life-saving jewel bestowed upon a young queen by a kindly vizier.

name: Paladin Sword
lore: The sigil blade of the legendary Brother Yhols of Gausra, stripped from its scabbard on the day of his controversial excommunication.

description_raw:
Active: Lesser Avatar

Applies a basic dispel. Grants %magic_resist%%% magic resistance and immunity to reflected and pure damage for %duration%s. For the duration of the effect, any negative effect from enemy spells has no effect.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: The trophy from a mighty beast ambushed and slain in the recesses of its own home.

description_raw:
Passive: Impeding Corruption

Attacks reduce the target's armor and movement speed. Slow amount varies based on whether the wearer is melee or ranged.
lore: An ingot of chaos suspended in wizard's ether, housed within an arcanist's orb.

name: The Leveller
description_raw:
Passive: Level

Attacks deal %demolish%%% more damage to buildings.
lore: A demonic blade that struck the final blow to crack the gates of the Sanctum of Solanas.

name: Arcane Ring
description_raw:
Active: Replenish Mana

Restores mana equal to %mana_restore% + %mana_restore_pct%%% of the caster's maximum mana pool to all nearby allies.

Radius: %radius%
lore: Once a prized heirloom of a minor lord's house.

name: Titan Sliver
lore: Though many desire this brilliant shard for its obvious qualities, a school of study exists to determine the true size and purpose of its incomprehensible whole.

description_raw:
Passive: Chipper

Every time you are attacked, you return %damage_return_hero% damage to heroes and %damage_return_creep% damage to creeps.
lore: It doesn't look like much, but it's oddly comfy.

name: Elven Tunic
lore: Even simple items of elven make seem imbued with inexplicable efficacy.

name: Cloak of Flames
description_raw:
Passive: Immolate

Burns enemy units in a %radius% unit radius for %damage% damage per second. Illusions deal %damage_illusions% damage per second.
lore: A very fine cloak that plays host to an overly-protective living flame.

name: Trickster Cloak
description_raw:
Active: Cloak

Causes you to become invisible for %duration% seconds.
lore: A fantastic garment immediately misplaced by its creator upon completion.

name: Possessed Mask
description_raw:
Passive: Lifesteal

Heals the attacker for %lifesteal% HP on each attack.
lore: Even when discarded with specific purpose and great care, this frightening mask always finds its way onto the face of a new owner.

name: Penta-Edged Sword
description_raw:
Passive: Maim

Each attack has a %maim_chance%%% chance to reduce enemy hero movement speed by %maim_slow_movement%%% and attack speed by %maim_slow_attack% for %maim_duration% seconds.
lore: The final, twisted work of a severely pious blacksmith, completed immediately before the taking of his own life.

name: Bullwhip
description_raw:
Active: Whip

Grants %speed%%% movement speed when cast on allies, and slows by %speed%%% when cast on enemies. Lasts %duration% seconds.
lore: Once the favored lash of an infamous broker of pit fighters and other live trade.

description_raw:
Active: Psychic Push

Pushes the target unit away from you %push_length% distance.
lore: A failed experiment in finer telekinetic control, still fit for other ends.

description_raw:
Passive: Ceremonial Aura

Lowers enemy Status Resistance by %status_resistance%%% and Magic Resistance by %magic_resistance%%%.

Radius: %aura_radius%
lore: One of many items lost in the looting of Zelenwyr's sacred reliquary.

name: Quicksilver Amulet
description_raw:
Passive: Quicksilver

Grants you a bonus %bonus_movement%%% movement speed and %bonus_attack% attack speed anytime one of your abilities are on cooldown.
lore: An enchanted talisman brimming with a mysterious substance.

name: Book of Shadows
description_raw:
Active: Shadows

Target an enemy, ally or self. Causes the target to become untargetable from enemies to the caster, but also silenced, muted and disarmed for %duration% seconds. Applies a Basic Dispel.\n\nDispel Type: Basic Dispel
lore: An impossible tome filled with unreadable prose of unknowable thoughts.

name: Giant's Ring
description_raw:
Passive: Giant's Foot

Can path over any terrain and deals %pct_str_damage_per_second%%% of your strength per second to units you are standing ontop of.
lore: Prized procurement of an otherwise unremarkable ruler of Elze who abdicated his position and vanished.

name: Stormcrafter
description_raw:
Passive: Bottled Lightning

Zaps %max_targets% enemy targets within %range% range, dealing %damage% damage and a %slow%%% slow for %slow_duration% seconds.
lore: The accidental byproduct of a spell conjured to entrap a lesser god.

name: Fairy's Trinket
lore: A small token imbued with the fortune of the fae in recognition of an intriguing display of mortal kindness.

name: Ascetic's Cap
description_raw:
Passive: Endurance

Whenever a debuff would be applied to the owner, grant %status_resistance%%% Status resistance and %slow_resistance%%% Slow Resistance for %duration% seconds.
lore: An austere hat thought to be of Turstarkuri origin.

description_raw:
Passive: Dark Mercy

Your attacks deal %bonus_damage% more damage to enemies for each %missing_hp%%% HP they are missing.
lore: An infamous assassin's blade stolen and smuggled out of White Spire after its owner's mysterious demise.

name: Witchbane
description_raw:
Active: Cleanse

Dispel all enemies and allies in a %radius% unit radius.

Dispel Type: Basic Dispel\n\n

Passive: Subjugate

Your attacks deal bonus magical damage equal to %damage%%% of your target's Max Mana.
lore: With ready access to test subjects, untold cruelties have been dreamed up and loosed upon the world from within the walls of the Tyler Estate.

description_raw:
Active: Pig, Out!

Turns your hero into a critter for %duration% seconds and gives them +%active_movespeed_pct%%% Movement Speed.
lore: A makeshift charm misplaced by a peace-loving, addlebrained enchanter.

description_raw:
Active: Vault

Propels your hero forward %leap_distance% units. Tumbler's Toy gets disabled for 3 seconds if its owner receives damage from a player source.
lore: An antique plaything found in the ruins of an Ozenja circus bazaar.

name: Fae Grenade
description_raw:
Active: Shadow Brand

Throws a Mark towards an enemy within %abilitycastrange% range applying a debuff that deals %dps% damage every second and provides vision of the unit for %duration% seconds.
lore: Those marked for death by the fae shine brightly to all manner of creatures in the shadow realm.

name: Seeds of Serenity
description_raw:
Active: Verdurous Dale

Target the ground with a %radius% radius. Provides health regeneration to all allied units while they are in the area of effect equal to %aura_health_regen% + %aura_health_regen_pct%%% of the caster's health regeneration at the time of casting. Lasts %duration% seconds.
lore: An evergreen sprout treasured by the woodkin and highly coveted by interlopers and their like.

name: Lance of Pursuit
description_raw:
Passive: Hound

Attacking from behind slows enemies by %slow_pct_melee%%% (%slow_pct_ranged%%% if Ranged) and deals %backstab_damage% more damage. Slow lasts %slow_duration% second(s).
lore: The gleaming weapon of a tarnished knight haunted by his duties to an unworthy king.

description_raw:
Passive: Rites of Eloshar

Each time the wearer is attacked, they gain a stack of %mana_regen% mana regen, up to %stack_limit% stacks. Stacks last for %stack_duration% seconds.
lore: A band that bears effigy of the dark goddess Eloshar's unsleeping eye.

description_raw:
Active: Ogre Seal Flop

Flop forward like an ogre seal %max_bounces% times, dealing %flop_damage% damage and slowing enemies in a %radius% radius by %slow%%% for %slow_duration% second on each bounce. %leap_distance% bounce distance.

name: Harpoon
description_raw:
Active: Draw Forth

When targeting an enemy, fire a harpoon at them, that pulls you and the target closer together, up to %pull_distance_pct%%% of the distance between you and your target. If the caster is melee, the hero and target are always pulled to within melee distance of each other. Targeting a tree always pulls you all the way to that tree.\n\n

Passive: Echo Strike

Causes melee attacks to attack twice in quick succession. The double attacks apply a %movement_slow%%% movement slow for %slow_duration% seconds on the first strike. Echo Strike cooldown: %passive_cooldown%s
lore: A perfect solution for the flight of foes.

description_raw:
Passive: Reciprocity

When attacked, the hero counter-attacks a target within their attack range for %counter_damage%%% of their regular attack damage.

name: Eye of the Vizier
lore: The ring of a cunning court mage who imprisoned a cadre of enemies to serve as his personal mana reserve.

description_raw:
Active: Imbrue

Consume health to temporarily gain %bonus_damage% damage for %duration% seconds.
lore: A sinister shiv that grants favor to those willing to stain its blade with a sacrifice of their own blood.

name: Beloved Memory
description_raw:
Active: Honor the Dead

Place this Offering on an Altar to honor the dead with a memory from those they left behind.
lore: Take joy in remembering those beloved who've passed now beyond the veil.

name: Scrying Shovel
description_raw:
Active: Dig

Search the map for Offerings to the dead.
lore: You don't know where it came from, but it knows where you need to go. All you need to do is dig.

name: Forebearer's Fortune
description_raw:
Active: Undying Promise

Signal to the spirits of the other realm your commitment to honoring them. If everyone in the battle makes an Undying Promise before the fight begins, the dead might be willing to listen.
lore: This item seems unstable. Like it might just disappear.

name: Mercy & Grace
description_raw:
Active: Dead Shot

Fires a ghostly bullet at an enemy unit or tree. When the bullet strikes it will deal %damage% damage and slow the target by %impact_slow_percent%%% for %impact_slow_duration% seconds, then ricochet in the vector-targeted direction. The ricochet will damage all units that it passes through, stopping when it hits a hero. Heroes hit by the ricochet will be feared for %ricochet_fear_duration% seconds in the direction of the shot.
lore: One to deliver the body, the other to claim the soul.

name: Tier 1 Token
description_raw: Activate to redeem a Tier 1 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: Tier 2 Token
description_raw: Activate to redeem a Tier 2 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: Tier 3 Token
description_raw: Activate to redeem a Tier 3 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: Tier 4 Token
description_raw: Activate to redeem a Tier 4 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: Tier 5 Token
description_raw: Activate to redeem a Tier 5 Neutral Item. The resulting neutral item isn't shareable and a hero can only redeem a single token per tier.

name: Vindicator's Axe
description_raw:
Passive: Vengeance

Provides %bonus_damage% damage if equipped hero is Silenced and %bonus_armor% armor if equipped hero is Stunned.

Passive: Boldness

Grants %bonus_attack_speed% attack speed as long as there are enemy heroes within %radius% units.

name: Ancient Guardian
description_raw:
Passive: Ancient Power

Grants %extra_bonus_damage% extra bonus damage as long as the unit is within %radius% range of an ancient.

name: Safety Bubble
description_raw:
Passive: Bubbled Up

Equipped Hero has a %shield% HP Barrier against enemy damage. Barrier fully regenerates after not receiving damage for %restore_time% seconds. Self-inflicted damage bypasses the barrier.

Passive: Tunnel Vision

Equipped Hero has their daytime vision reduced by %vision_penalty%%% but their Spell damage increased by %bonus_spell_damage%%%.
lore: The air that passes through this amulet makes a dreadful sound.

description_raw:
Passive: Glass Cannon

Hero takes %debuff_self%%% more damage from all sources.\n

Passive: Glassify

When attacking a hero, apply a debuff increasing the damage received by that hero by %debuff_enemy%%% for %debuff_enemy_duration% seconds. Only one target can be affected by Glassify at the same time.

name: Aviana's Feather
description_raw:
Passive: Free Bird

When equipped hero is below %flight_threshold%%% HP, they gain flying movement.

name: Unwavering Condition
description_raw:
Passive: Unwavering

Hero's Max Health is set to %max_health% and can't be altered by other effects or attributes.

name: Dandelion Amulet
description_raw:
Passive: Magical Damage Block

Every %AbilityCooldown%s, blocks up to %magic_block% magic damage from damage instances over %min_damage% damage.

name: Martyr's Plate
description_raw:
Active: Martyrdom

Redirect %damage_redirection%%% of all magic damage dealt to your allied heroes within %aura_radius% radius towards you for %duration% seconds.

Passive: Sixth Sense

Automatically dodge an attack from an enemy hero.

name: Light Collector
description_raw:
Active: Lightbreak

Produce a brilliant flash of light that destroys trees in a %tree_destruction_radius% AoE. \n\n

Passive: Unclouded

Provides wearer with health regeneration during the day and mana regeneration during the night. When within a %radius% distance of any trees, health and mana regeneration are decreased by %penalty%%%.

Passive: Reverberate

After taking %damage_threshold% damage from any source, the wearer fires a projectile at up to %target_count% random enemies in a %radius% radius, prioritizing heroes, that deal %projectile_damage% physical damage and slow the targets movement and attack speed by %slow%%% for %slow_duration%s.

name: Doubloon
description_raw:
Toggle: Flip

Toggle to convert %conversion_pct%%% of your Max Health to Max Mana, or %conversion_pct%%% of your Max Mana to Max Health.

name: Roshan's Banner
description_raw:
Use: Place Banner

Creates a banner at the target location. Lane creeps in the area of effect become damage immune while the Banner is up. Lasts %duration% seconds.

Can be destroyed. Melee hero attacks deal 2x damage to the banner.

name: Black Grimoire\n(Warlock)
description_raw:
Use: Profane Knowledge

Hero kills and assists empower the Black Grimoire, granting it charges. Right-click to consume and grant %xp_per_charge% experience per charge. Starts on cooldown.
This item cannot be dropped.

name: Gris-Gris
description_raw: This item that cannot be dropped or placed in the backpack but can be put into normal inventory slots. When the owner dies, %death_gold_lost_reduction_pct%%% of the gold lost from death is added to the item, and will be refunded when the item is consumed. Right-click to consume and permanently remove the item.

Passive: Relentless

Increases slow resistance by %max_slow_res%%%. This bonus is reduced by %hero_reduction%%% for every enemy hero within the wearer's attack radius.
lore: A serpent's eye the size of a melon (and just as moist).

description_raw:
Active: Bottoms Up

Restores %mana_restore% + %mana_restore_pct%%% of the caster's maximum mana over %heal_duration% seconds. If the hero is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

Hold Control to use on an allied hero.\n\n

Passive: Fill Up

Cooldown Speed of Mana Draught is increased by %water_acceleration%%% while in water.
lore: A refreshing drink best shared with friends.

description_raw:
Active: Flay

Embeds thorns into all enemies in a %thorn_area% unit radius. Affected units take additional damage when attacked for %duration% seconds.
lore: The Fae horticulturists of Revtel are known to push the boundaries of both cross pollination and safety.

description_raw:
Active: Hobble

Hits an enemy for %damage% damage, then slows them by %slow_pct%%% and reduces Health Restoration by %heal_reduce%%% for %duration% seconds. The slow gradually fades over the duration of the spell.
lore: The ever-weeping woodgrain of this crossbow coats every bolt in a potent but short-lived narcotic sap.

description_raw:
Active: Cyclonic Shield

Envelops the caster in an all damage barrier that absorbs %barrier_pct%%% of incoming damage up to a max of %barrier_amount%. Lasts for up to %barrier_duration% seconds and while the barrier is active you have %slow_resist%%% Slow Resistance.
lore: If one truly listens, they can always rely upon the wind to make its will known.

description_raw:
Passive: Beat the Crowd

Your next attack deals an additional %bonus_damage% magic damage and splashes to units within %splash_radius% units for %splash_pct%%% of the original attack's damage plus the additional magic damage.
lore: A 'harmless' prank that went entirely too far.

description_raw:
Passive: Burn Through

Instances of magic damage from spells over %damage_threshold% ignites enemies, causing them to take %burn_damage% magic damage over %burn_duration% seconds. Burn damage against non-hero targets is decreased by %creep_penalty%%%.
lore: To torture a magic user, one must devise means far beyond the mundane.

description_raw:
Passive: Gut 'Em

Attacks have a %proc_chance%%% chance to have True Strike and deal %hp_dmg%%% of the target's current health as bonus physical damage. Deals a flat bonus of %hp_dmg_rosh% against Roshan.
lore: Too dangerous for taskwork, this blade's only purpose is vile murder.

description_raw:
Active: Ribbit

Increases the health regeneration of a target ally by %regen_boost% for %duration% seconds. While standing in water, the blessed unit also moves %water_movespeed%%% faster.
lore: A tiny trinket that wriggles when wet.

description_raw:
Passive: Keen Eye

Increases cast range by %bonus_cast_range% and attack range by %bonus_attack_range% (Melee & Ranged). Taking over %damage_threshold% damage from a player controlled source or Roshan disables this effect for %damage_disable% seconds.
lore: Deadly refinement.

description_raw:
Active: Retribution

For the next %damage_time% seconds, %damage_pct%%% of damage taken by the caster is reflected to the target unit as physical damage if they are within %max_distance% units away.
lore: There are generals that care far less about the survival of their troops than the destruction of their enemies.

name: Madstone Bundle
description_raw: Collect to craft new Neutral Items.

Active: One for the Road

Increases movement speed of all allied units by %movespeed_pct%%% in a %buff_radius% unit radius around the caster for %buff_duration% seconds.
lore: The Kobold King will sip when he damn well pleases.

description_raw:
Passive: Hidden Potential

Neutral Artifacts you craft while holding a Dormant Curio have their potency increased by %item_potency%%%.
lore: Everyone has an idea, but no one has a clue.

description_raw:
Passive: Veiled

When falling below %hp_threshold%%% HP, gain %evasion_max%%% evasion for %max_duration% seconds. While active, dodging an attack decreases the evasion bonus by %evasion_loss%%% of its current value.\n

Passive: Last Caress

Veiled cooldown is only reset if the wearer dies or kills an enemy hero.
lore: A pall that draped the sarcophagus of the First Sister.

description_raw:
Active: Pollinate

Spreads pollen on all enemy units in a %debuff_radius% unit radius for %debuff_duration% seconds, decreasing their health restoration by %health_regen_loss%%% and dealing damage per second, the total equal to %hp_damage%%% of their maximum health.
lore: Very dangerous. Very difficult to obtain more.

description_raw:
Active: Self-Exile

Makes the caster completely invulnerable and disabled for %invuln_duration% seconds. When returning to the world, the caster takes %self_dmg_pct%%% of their maximum health as damage.
lore: Proof that the lone sentinel was not always so.

description_raw:
Passive: Blood Invocation

Spells have a %aoe_pct%%% larger Area of Effect, but now additionally cost health equal to %health_pct%%% of their mana cost.
lore: The gateway to a lost lineage of power, unlocked only with blood.

description_raw:
Passive: Crushing Blow

Empowers the next attack to be a critical hit dealing %crit_multiplier%%% damage. Hitting an enemy with an empowered attack temporarily decreases their movement speed by %movespeed_slow%%%, attack speed by %attack_slow%%%, and cast speed by %cast_slow%%% for %debuff_duration% seconds.
lore: Crude but smashingly effective.

description_raw:
Passive: Exalted

Increases outgoing damage by %outgoing_damage%%%. Dying permanently disables this Neutral Item and the current Enchantment is lost.
lore: So magnificent, it cannot abide failure.

description_raw:
Passive: Fallen

You have died and thus get nothing.
lore: It cannot abide failure.

name: Bag of Gold
description_raw: Contains gold

name: Specialist's Array
description_raw:
Passive: Splitshot

Ranged attacks have a %proc_chance%%% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to %count% nearby enemies with %secondary_target_range_bonus% extra range and within a %secondary_target_angle% degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct%%% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects. The primary attack deals %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct_primary_tooltip%%% damage of a normal attack.
lore: An impressive kit of trigger enhancements born in an aging assassin's idle mind.

name: Hydra's Breath
description_raw:
Passive: Miasma

Attacks poison enemies, dealing %poison_damage_per_second%%% of the target's Max HP as Magical Damage per second for %poison_duration% seconds.\n\n

Passive: Polycephaly

Ranged attacks have a %proc_chance%%% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to %count% nearby enemies with %secondary_target_range_bonus% extra range and within a %secondary_target_angle% degree angle in front of the attacker. The additional projectiles deal %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct%%% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects except for Miasma. The primary attack deals %base_proc_dmg% + %proc_dmg_pct_primary_tooltip%%% damage of a normal attack.

Passive: Loaded

Increases your base damage maximum by %bonus_max_damage%. When calculating your base damage or creep bounty from last hits, the value is computed %roll_count% times and the highest value is taken.

Active: Shield Wall

Reduce your own movement speed by %slow% to provide a %block_amount% physical damage barrier to allied player controlled units in a %block_radius% unit radius. Lasts for %duration% seconds.

Active: Refract

Spend %health_cost%%% of your current life total to create a full health illusion that lasts for 20 seconds. The illusion has %outgoing_damage%%% outgoing damage and takes %incoming_damage%%% of incoming damage.

Active: Pupate

Enter into an insect form for %duration% seconds, increasing magic resistance by %bonus_magic_resistance%%% and movement speed by %bonus_movespeed%%%. While an insect, your size is decreased and your armor is reduced by %armor_decrease%%%.

Active: False Flight

Gain %slow_resist%%% slow resistance, phased movement, and %evasion%%% evasion for %duration% seconds.

Active: Bloodthirst

Gain %base_damage%%% base damage and %attack_speed% attack speed for %duration% seconds.\n\n

Passive: Bloodrush

Enemy heroes dying within %death_radius% units reset the cooldown of Bloodthirst.

Passive: Salvo

%mana_pct%%% of the mana used to cast abilities is recovered over %duration% seconds.

Passive: Linger

%delay_pct%%% of incoming damage is delayed over %delay_time% seconds.

Toggle: Transmogrify

Toggle to switch the contents of the Satchel between a pound of Feathers or Rocks.

Feathers: increase movement speed by %feather_movespeed% and distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by %knockback_resistance%%%.

Rocks: increase armor by %rocks_armor% and decrease the distance of forced movement effects applied to the wearer by %knockback_resistance%%%.

Passive: Enchant

Increases the bonuses of the item's Neutral Enchantment by %enchantment_bonus_base%%%. Every time this item is crafted again the bonus is increased by %enchantment_bonus_growth%%%.

Passive: Balance

Gain %manacost_reduction%%% spell mana cost reduction for every ability off cooldown and %spell_amp%%% spell amplification for every ability on cooldown.

Passive: Spellover

Dealing %damage_threshold% spell damage to an enemy causes them to overheat and deal damage to their allies in a %damage_aoe% unit radius. Hero targets deal %damage% damage to their allies, other targets deal %damage_creep% damage.

Passive: Forage

When the cooldown is ready, nearby trees that can be foraged will appear. By standing next to a tree for %AbilityChannelTime%s, you can forage the tree and find flora, fungi or a bag of gold containing %gold_amount% gold.

name: Vital Toadstool
description_raw:
Use: Munch

Grants %health_regen_pct%%% max health regeneration to the target for %buff_duration% seconds.

If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost.

name: Ironwood Nut
description_raw:
Use: Munch

Grants %bonus_stat% permanent primary attribute.

name: Tomo'kan Ringcap
description_raw:
Use: Munch

Instantly restores %replenish_amount% mana + %mana_pct%%% of the target's max mana when consumed

Passive: Brand

Increases spell damage dealt to player controlled units by %bonus_damage_pct%%%.

name: Leviathan's Fish
description_raw: Yummy Fish
